mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit expectations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or unemployment declines without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in co-expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) and inflation (CPIAUCSL) signal a tightening monetary cycle, raising discount rates and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or inflation declines without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) signals robust labor market conditions, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 signals weak supply-side dynamics, reducing corporate margins and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or industrial production recovers without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and real sales (RSAFS) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in co-expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) and unemployment (UNRATE) signal a tightening monetary cycle with weakening labor markets, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or unemployment declines without corresponding equity gains.
